name: Module Tree Health Check
summary: Collect read-only evidence about visible HPC module tree health.
description: This skill helps HPC support teams and software-stack maintainers collect read-only evidence about MODULEPATH, visible modules, module metadata, and common compiler or MPI command paths without loading, unloading, or modifying user environments.

tools.name: module
tools.notes: Usually provided as a shell function by Lmod or Environment Modules.

inputs.name: module_name
inputs.description: Optional module name or pattern to inspect with module spider or module whatis.

inputs.name: output_dir
inputs.description: Directory where the module health report should be written.

outputs.name: module_tree_report
outputs.description: A local directory containing read-only module tree, MODULEPATH, metadata, and common tool path snapshots.

outputs.name: summary
outputs.description: A summary file describing report scope and review guidance.

tests.description: Validate the manifest and report script reference.
Check shell syntax without requiring a module system.
Run on a login node with Lmod or Environment Modules and confirm it does not load, unload, purge, or modify modules.
